headline: ⚡ 13:45 GST — Heads Down, Builders. The Deadline Is Calling.
body: With 8 messages buzzing across Discord in the last hour, the room is locked in and shipping toward the 16:30 cutoff — zero submissions on the board is exactly where we expect to be this close to crunch time. Four tracks wide open, just under three hours to go: now's the moment to turn momentum into a submission.
